$comment: Layer B selection cases for MANIFEST vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS O3-flat: a group table decomposed into parallel per-leaf tables). Candidate B collapses the per-row storage into one shared quantity field (only the last read survives), so every extension prices from row 3's quantity - caught on every case whose quantities differ. Cases cover the triple half-cent tie at odd tenths, the 100.00 BIG boundary, distinct quantities, and zero and max rows.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 MANIFEST (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-manifest)
